design_principles_v2: 각 슬라이드에 관련 일러스트/아이콘 1개 이상 크게
텍스트만 가득 찬 구성 절대 금지

slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin on all four sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe across full width with COMPACT white text '열성경련 긴급 가이드'. Below stripe top-right: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no decoration. Upper-center headline area, COMPACT (about 25% smaller than a typical cover headline): '아이가 경련해요' white bold, second line '지금 당장 어떻게 해야 하나요?' with the key emphasis '지금 당장' rendered in bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle below the headline with comfortable spacing: '열성경련 대처 · AAP 가이드라인 기준'. Center-to-lower area: a LARGE prominent line illustration of a child lying sideways in recovery position (white outline on the dark background), occupying significant visual area as the focal element. Bottom-left small gray text: 'PARENTING NOTE · 008'. Generous bottom whitespace. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small. Top-left small white label: '열성경련이란'. Top-center area below the label: a MEDIUM-LARGE line illustration of a child silhouette with subtle motion lines suggesting seizure tremor (white outline on dark background, restrained), as a clear focal element. COMPACT headline below the icon (about 25% smaller): '소아의 2-5%가 경험해요' white, '2-5%' rendered in bright red #E63946 bold. Two cards side by side, REDUCED height with GENEROUS internal padding. Left card top: a small CLOCK ICON in white outline, label '단순 열성경련' red bold COMPACT, body white COMPACT '15분 미만 / 24시간 1회 / 전신성'. Right card top: a small WARNING TRIANGLE ICON in red, label '복잡 열성경련' red bold COMPACT, body white COMPACT '15분 이상 / 반복 / 국소성'. Bottom (with generous top margin) mint #2EC4B6 note COMPACT: '대부분 1-2분 내 자연 소실 — 뇌손상 일으키지 않아요'. No pixel values as text on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: '소아과언니' white. Top-left red label COMPACT: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'. COMPACT headline (about 25% smaller): '경련 중 이것만은 절대 금지' white, '절대 금지' in red #E63946. Five rows stacked vertically, each row: a SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON on the left (line art in white outline with a red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text on the right, with GENEROUS vertical spacing between rows. Row 1: finger-pointing-to-mouth icon ❌, text '입에 손가락·물건 넣기'. Row 2: restraining-hands icon ❌, text '억지로 붙잡거나 흔들기'. Row 3: water-cup icon ❌, text '물이나 약 먹이기'. Row 4: medicine-bottle icon ❌, text '해열제 억지로 투여'. Row 5: CPR-hands icon ❌, text '심폐소생술 (숨 쉬고 있을 때)'. Red outlined warning border around all rows with comfortable internal padding. No pixel values as text on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: '소아과언니' white. Top-left mint label COMPACT: '지금 당장 하세요 ✓'. COMPACT headline (about 25% smaller): '경련 중 해야 할 것' white, '해야 할 것' in mint #2EC4B6. Five rows stacked, each row: a SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON on the left (line art with a mint ✓ overlay) + COMPACT white text on the right, GENEROUS vertical spacing. Row 1: child-lying-sideways icon ✓, text '바닥에 옆으로 눕히기'. Row 2: hands-clearing-objects icon ✓, text '주변 위험물 치우기'. Row 3: stopwatch icon ✓, text '시간 재기 (몇 분인지)'. Row 4: loose-clothing icon ✓, text '옷 느슨하게 하기'. Row 5: smartphone-recording icon ✓, text '경련 모습 동영상 촬영'. Mint outlined box around all rows with comfortable internal padding. No pixel values as text on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: '소아과언니' white. Full-width bright red #E63946 header bar with COMPACT white bold text '지금 바로 119'. Below header bar: a LARGE prominent line illustration of an ambulance with siren OR a clear emergency icon with the digits as a graphic element (white outline on dark, with subtle red glow accent), occupying meaningful visual area as the focal element. COMPACT headline below the illustration: '이럴 때는 즉시 119' white. Five numbered items stacked, each row: medium-sized red number on the left + COMPACT white text on the right (about 25% smaller than typical), VERY GENEROUS vertical spacing between rows for easy reading. 1 5분 이상 경련이 계속될 때. 2 경련 후 의식이 돌아오지 않을 때. 3 호흡이 어려워 보일 때. 4 24시간 내 2회 이상 반복될 때. 5 생후 6개월 미만 영아일 때. Red rounded border around all rows with comfortable internal padding. Subtle red glow effect around the border. No pixel values as text on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: '소아과언니' white. Top-left small white label: '경련 후 대처'. Top-center area: a MEDIUM-LARGE line illustration of a pediatric clinic building with a small cross sign, OR a kindly doctor/stethoscope silhouette (white outline on dark, with a mint accent on the cross/stethoscope), as a clear focal element. COMPACT headline below the icon (about 25% smaller): '경련이 멈췄어요, 이제는?' white. Two stacked cards REDUCED height with GENEROUS internal padding. Card 1 mint #2EC4B6 border: '5분 미만이었다면' mint label COMPACT, body white COMPACT '당일 소아과 진료 / 처음이라면 원인 파악 필요'. Card 2 red #E63946 border: '5분 이상이었거나 의심되면' red label COMPACT, body white COMPACT '119 또는 응급실 / 경련 영상 있으면 꼭 보여주세요'. Bottom (with generous top margin) small white: '경련 직후 아이가 졸리거나 처지는 것은 정상입니다'. No pixel values as text on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: '소아과언니' white. Top-left mint label COMPACT: '부모님께'. COMPACT headline (about 25% smaller): '무서웠겠지만, 알아두세요' white. Three reassurance cards stacked, each REDUCED height with GENEROUS internal padding and a mint left border accent. Each card has a PROMINENTLY VISIBLE line art icon on the left side. Card 1: a BRAIN-WITH-RED-STRIKETHROUGH icon on left (brain outline in white with a diagonal red slash overlay), body COMPACT white on right '단순 열성경련은 지능·발달·학습에 영향 없어요'. Card 2: a BRAIN-OUTLINE icon on left in mint with subtle check mark or low-percentage indicator, body COMPACT white on right '뇌전증 발생률 1-2% — 일반 소아(0.5%)보다 약간 높지만 매우 낮아요'. Card 3: an AMBER RECURRING-ARROW icon on left (curved arrow looping back), body COMPACT white on right '30% 재발하지만 대부분 단순 경련이에요'. Bottom (with generous top margin) mint note COMPACT: '해열제로 재발을 막을 수 없어요 — AAP 공식 입장'. No pixel values as text on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: '소아과언니' white. Top-left label: 'CHECKLIST'. Top-center area: a MEDIUM-LARGE line illustration of a clipboard with notes and a pen, OR a doctor consultation memo pad (white outline on dark with mint accent on the cross/pen), as a clear focal element. COMPACT headline below the icon (about 25% smaller): '경련 후 소아과에서 말할 것' white. Checklist box red outline with GENEROUS internal padding. Items as rows, each row: a white checkbox square on the left + COMPACT white text on the right (about 25% smaller), VERY GENEROUS vertical spacing between rows. □ 경련 시작 시각과 지속 시간. □ 경련 모습 (전신? 한쪽만?). □ 경련 전 체온. □ 의식 회복까지 걸린 시간. □ 오늘 먹은 약. □ 최근 감염 증상. Bottom (with generous top margin) mint note COMPACT: '동영상 촬영했다면 꼭 보여주세요'. No pixel values as text on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. VERY GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small. Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'. Large center headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' white, '저장하세요' mint #2EC4B6 underline. Below headline with comfortable spacing: source box dark card #1A2B3C rounded with GENEROUS internal padding, left-aligned. Inside box: small white bold '출처'. Two lines small gray with comfortable line spacing: '· AAP CPG. Pediatrics 121(6), 2008 (PMID 18519501)' / '· Nelson Textbook of Pediatrics, 21st ed. 2020'. Generous vertical spacing, then thin white horizontal divider. Center: large '소아과언니' white bold. Small gray below: 'DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의'. Generous vertical spacing, then thin divider. Small white '@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드'. Small mint '소아과수첩 앱 · 야간·달빛병원 바로 찾기'. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.
